class.name: FmodAudioStreamPlayer3D
class.brief_description: A 3D node for playing FMOD audio streams with full spatial audio support.
class.description: FmodAudioStreamPlayer3D is a 3D node that plays [FmodAudioStream] resources using the FMOD audio engine. It provides full 3D spatial audio capabilities including distance attenuation, doppler effect, and directional emission. Key features: - Full 3D spatial audio with configurable attenuation models - Doppler effect support with velocity tracking - Directional emission cone for focused sound projection - Distance-based filtering (air absorption simulation) - Multiple attenuation models (inverse, inverse square, linear, disabled) - Area mask for filtering by physics layers - Stream playback with play/pause/stop/seek controls - Volume and pitch control - Bus routing for mixing This node is ideal for 3D games where realistic spatial audio is required for environmental sounds, character voices, or positional effects.

method.name: get_area_mask
method.description: Returns the area mask used for physics-based audio filtering. The default value is [code]1[/code] (first layer).

method.name: get_attenuation_filter_cutoff_hz
method.description: Returns the cutoff frequency for the distance attenuation filter. Simulates air absorption by reducing high frequencies at distance. The default value is [code]5000.0[/code] Hz.

method.name: get_attenuation_filter_db
method.description: Returns the attenuation level of the distance filter in dB. The default value is [code]0.0[/code] dB.

method.name: get_attenuation_model
method.description: Returns the current attenuation model. See [enum AttenuationModel] for possible values.

method.name: get_bus
method.description: Returns the name of the audio bus this player outputs to. The default value is [code]&"Master"[/code].

method.name: get_doppler_tracking
method.description: Returns the current doppler tracking mode. See [enum DopplerTracking] for possible values.

method.name: get_emission_angle
method.description: Returns the inner emission angle in degrees. Sound is at full volume within this cone. The default value is [code]45.0[/code] degrees.

method.name: get_emission_angle_filter_attenuation_db
method.description: Returns the attenuation outside the emission cone in dB. The default value is [code]-12.0[/code] dB.

method.name: get_max_distance
method.description: Returns the maximum distance in meters at which the sound is audible. The default value is [code]10.0[/code] meters.

method.name: get_pitch
method.description: Returns the current pitch scale of the audio playback. [code]1.0[/code] is the default pitch, [code]0.5[/code] is one octave lower, [code]2.0[/code] is one octave higher.

method.name: get_playback_position
method.description: Returns the current playback position in seconds. Returns [code]0.0[/code] if not playing.

method.name: get_stream
method.description: Returns the [FmodAudioStream] currently assigned to this player. Returns [code]null[/code] if no stream is set.

method.name: get_stream_paused
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the stream playback is currently paused.

method.name: get_unit_size
method.description: Returns the unit size in meters, representing the minimum distance before attenuation begins. The default value is [code]1.0[/code] meter.

method.name: get_volume_db
method.description: Returns the current volume in decibels. The default value is [code]0.0[/code] dB (unity gain).

method.name: is_autoplay_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if autoplay is enabled. When enabled, playback starts automatically when the node enters the scene tree.

method.name: is_emission_angle_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the emission angle cone is enabled. When enabled, sound is directional within the configured cone.

method.name: is_playing
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if audio is currently playing. Note that this returns [code]false[/code] when paused, even though playback is active.

method.name: play
method.description: Starts playing the assigned stream from the specified position in seconds. If [param from_position] is negative, playback starts from the beginning.

method.name: seek
method.description: Seeks to the specified position in seconds during playback. This can be called while playing or paused.

method.name: set_area_mask
method.description: Sets the area mask for physics-based audio filtering. Only areas matching this mask will affect this player's audio.

method.name: set_attenuation_filter_cutoff_hz
method.description: Sets the cutoff frequency for the distance attenuation filter. Lower values simulate more air absorption by cutting high frequencies at distance.

method.name: set_attenuation_filter_db
method.description: Sets the attenuation level of the distance filter in dB. Controls how much the filter affects distant sounds.

method.name: set_attenuation_model
method.description: Sets the attenuation model for distance-based volume falloff. See [enum AttenuationModel] for available options.

method.name: set_auto_play
method.description: Enables or disables autoplay. When enabled, the stream starts playing automatically when the node enters the scene tree.

method.name: set_bus
method.description: Sets the audio bus to route this player's output to. The bus name should match a bus in the [FmodAudioBusLayout].

method.name: set_doppler_tracking
method.description: Sets the doppler tracking mode for velocity-based pitch changes. See [enum DopplerTracking] for available options.

method.name: set_emission_angle
method.description: Sets the inner emission angle in degrees. Sound is at full volume within this cone and attenuated outside.

method.name: set_emission_angle_enabled
method.description: Enables or disables the directional emission cone. When enabled, sound is projected in a cone rather than omnidirectionally.

method.name: set_emission_angle_filter_attenuation_db
method.description: Sets the attenuation outside the emission cone in dB. More negative values create a sharper directional effect.

method.name: set_max_distance
method.description: Sets the maximum distance in meters at which the sound is audible. Beyond this distance, volume may be cut off depending on the attenuation model.

method.name: set_pitch
method.description: Sets the pitch scale of the audio playback. [code]1.0[/code] is normal pitch. Higher values increase pitch and playback speed.

method.name: set_playing
method.description: Controls playback state. Setting to [code]true[/code] starts playback from the beginning. Setting to [code]false[/code] stops playback.

method.name: set_stream
method.description: Sets the [FmodAudioStream] to play. The stream can be changed during playback, which will stop the current playback and start the new stream if playing.

method.name: set_stream_paused
method.description: Pauses or resumes playback without changing position.

method.name: set_unit_size
method.description: Sets the unit size in meters, representing the minimum distance before attenuation begins. This affects the scale of the 3D audio world.

method.name: set_volume_db
method.description: Sets the volume in decibels. [code]0.0[/code] is unity gain. Negative values attenuate, positive values amplify (if supported).

method.name: stop
method.description: Stops playback and resets the position to the beginning.

members.member: Physics layer mask for area-based audio filtering.
Cutoff frequency for the distance attenuation filter in Hz.
Attenuation level of the distance filter in dB.
If [code]true[/code], audio plays automatically when the node enters the scene tree.
The name of the audio bus to route output to.
Doppler effect tracking mode. See [enum DopplerTracking].
Inner emission angle in degrees for directional sound projection.
Attenuation outside the emission cone in dB.
Maximum distance in meters at which the sound is audible.
Pitch scale of the audio. [code]1.0[/code] is the default pitch.
Current playback state. Can be set to start/stop playback.
Unit size in meters representing the minimum distance before attenuation begins.
Volume in decibels. [code]0.0[/code] is unity gain, negative values attenuate.

signal.name: finished
signal.description: Emitted when playback finishes (reaches the end of the stream).

constants.constant: Inverse distance attenuation model. Volume falls off as 1/distance. This is a realistic model for point sources in free field.
Inverse square distance attenuation model. Volume falls off as 1/distance². This is physically accurate for point sources in 3D space.
Linear/logarithmic attenuation model. Volume falls off linearly from unit_size to max_distance. This provides more consistent audible range compared to inverse models.
No distance attenuation. Sound plays at constant volume regardless of distance. Useful for UI sounds or globally audible audio.
Doppler effect is disabled. No pitch changes based on velocity.
Doppler effect is calculated during the idle/process step. Suitable for visual-only movement tracking.
Doppler effect is calculated during the physics step. Recommended for physics-based movement for accurate results.
